sub_modules.fp_unpack: Extracts sign, exponent, mantissa, and classification bits for both operands.
sub_modules.fp_special_cases: Handles NaN, infinity, and zero cases before the arithmetic datapath.
sub_modules.fp_align: Builds extended significands, orders operands by magnitude, aligns exponents, and generates sticky information.
sub_modules.fp_addsub: Performs signed significand addition or subtraction after alignment.
sub_modules.fp_normalize_round: Normalizes the raw result, applies rounding mode, packs the final value, and generates exception flags.
